entry.title: Trigger.dev
entry.description: Background job and workflow platform for TypeScript applications, long-running tasks, schedules, and durable automation.
entry.seoTitle: Trigger.dev background jobs for AI workflows
entry.seoDescription: Trigger.dev supports background jobs, schedules, long-running tasks, and durable workflows for TypeScript applications. HeyClaude adds source links, install...
entry.author: Trigger.dev
entry.cardDescription: Background jobs and workflows for TypeScript apps.
entry.body:
## Editorial notes

Trigger.dev is useful for AI products that need durable background jobs, retries, scheduled work, and observable workflow execution.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.
